positive: A symmetrical, minimalist composition featuring a central, stylized mountain range silhouette nestled within abstract geometric floral patterns. The primary color palette is limited to deep midnight blue, crisp off-white, and subtle metallic gold accents. The style should be inspired by Art Deco geometry and nature motifs, rendered with crisp vector graphic lines, strong contrast, and clean, solid color blocks. Emphasize thick, bold outlines and negative space. The final artwork must look scalable and perfect for textile printing, with no gradients or photographic elements. Include small, repeating celestial elements like stylized crescent moons and constellations orbiting the central mountain peaks. High contrast, perfectly clean lines, poster art quality.
negative: blur, noise, photographic, photorealism, gradient, watermark, logo, text, typography, signature, dirty, gritty, messy, complex details, artifacts, poor composition, cartoon, grainy, baja-scale, low detail
